pattern: SELECT * FROM restaurants LIMIT 10
normalized: select * from restaurants limit 10

pattern: SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_restaurants FROM restaurants
normalized: select count(*) as total_restaurants from restaurants

pattern: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema WHERE table_name = 'restaurants'
normalized: select column_name from information_schema where table_name = 'restaurants'

pattern: SELECT * FROM restaurants WHERE restaurant_id = 'R001'
normalized: select * from restaurants where restaurant_id = 'r001'

pattern: SELECT is_managed, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(monthly_orders) AS avg_orders, AVG(monthly_revenue) AS avg_revenue FROM restaurants GROUP BY is_managed
normalized: select is_managed, count(*) as cnt, avg(monthly_orders) as avg_orders, avg(monthly_revenue) as avg_revenue from restaurants group by is_managed

pattern: SELECT is_managed, AVG(conversion_rate) AS avg_conversion, AVG(customer_rating) AS avg_rating, AVG(avg_delivery_time_min) AS avg_delivery_time FROM restaurants GROUP BY is_managed
normalized: select is_managed, avg(conversion_rate) as avg_conversion, avg(customer_rating) as avg_rating, avg(avg_delivery_time_min) as avg_delivery_time from restaurants group by is_managed

pattern: SELECT cuisine_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(monthly_orders) AS avg_orders, AVG(monthly_revenue) AS avg_revenue FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine_type ORDER BY avg_orders DESC
normalized: select cuisine_type, count(*) as cnt, avg(monthly_orders) as avg_orders, avg(monthly_revenue) as avg_revenue from restaurants group by cuisine_type order by avg_orders desc

pattern: SELECT SUM(monthly_orders) AS total_orders, SUM(monthly_revenue) AS total_revenue, SUM(monthly_ad_spend) AS total_ad_spend FROM restaurants
normalized: select sum(monthly_orders) as total_orders, sum(monthly_revenue) as total_revenue, sum(monthly_ad_spend) as total_ad_spend from restaurants

pattern: SELECT is_managed, AVG(page_views) AS avg_page_views, AVG(review_count) AS avg_reviews, AVG(menu_item_count) AS avg_menu_items FROM restaurants GROUP BY is_managed
normalized: select is_managed, avg(page_views) as avg_page_views, avg(review_count) as avg_reviews, avg(menu_item_count) as avg_menu_items from restaurants group by is_managed

pattern: SELECT is_managed, SUM(CASE WHEN has_photos = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_photos, SUM(CASE WHEN has_pos_integration = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_pos, SUM(CASE WHEN uses_ads = 1 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS with_ads FROM restaurants GROUP BY is_managed
normalized: select is_managed, sum(case when has_photos = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as with_photos, sum(case when has_pos_integration = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as with_pos, sum(case when uses_ads = 1 then 1 else 0 end) as with_ads from restaurants group by is_managed

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0 ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue from restaurants where is_managed = 0 order by monthly_orders desc

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, conversion_rate FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0 AND monthly_orders > 300 ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, conversion_rate from restaurants where is_managed = 0 and monthly_orders > 300 order by monthly_orders desc

pattern: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE has_photos = 0 GROUP BY is_managed
normalized: select count(*) as cnt, is_managed from restaurants where has_photos = 0 group by is_managed

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, page_views, monthly_orders FROM restaurants ORDER BY page_views DESC LIMIT 15
normalized: select restaurant_id, page_views, monthly_orders from restaurants order by page_views desc limit 15

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, conversion_rate, monthly_orders, page_views FROM restaurants ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC LIMIT 15
normalized: select restaurant_id, conversion_rate, monthly_orders, page_views from restaurants order by conversion_rate desc limit 15

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed FROM restaurants ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed from restaurants order by monthly_orders desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed FROM restaurants ORDER BY monthly_orders ASC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed from restaurants order by monthly_orders asc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_revenue, is_managed FROM restaurants ORDER BY monthly_revenue DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_revenue, is_managed from restaurants order by monthly_revenue desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, customer_rating, review_count FROM restaurants ORDER BY customer_rating DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, customer_rating, review_count from restaurants order by customer_rating desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT cuisine_type, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(monthly_orders) AS avg_orders FROM restaurants GROUP BY cuisine_type HAVING COUNT(*) > 8 ORDER BY cnt DESC
normalized: select cuisine_type, count(*) as cnt, avg(monthly_orders) as avg_orders from restaurants group by cuisine_type having count(*) > 8 order by cnt desc

pattern: SELECT CASE WHEN monthly_orders < 50 THEN '0-49' WHEN monthly_orders < 200 THEN '50-199' WHEN monthly_orders < 500 THEN '200-499' WHEN monthly_orders < 1000 THEN '500-999' ELSE '1000+' END AS order_bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(monthly_revenue) AS total_revenue, AVG(is_managed) AS pct_managed FROM restaurants GROUP BY order_bucket ORDER BY order_bucket
normalized: select case when monthly_orders < 50 then '0-49' when monthly_orders < 200 then '50-199' when monthly_orders < 500 then '200-499' when monthly_orders < 1000 then '500-999' else '1000+' end as order_bucket, count(*) as cnt, sum(monthly_revenue) as total_revenue, avg(is_managed) as pct_managed from restaurants group by order_bucket order by order_bucket

pattern: SELECT zip_code, COUNT(*) AS cnt, AVG(monthly_orders) AS avg_orders, AVG(monthly_revenue) AS avg_revenue FROM restaurants GROUP BY zip_code HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY avg_orders DESC
normalized: select zip_code, count(*) as cnt, avg(monthly_orders) as avg_orders, avg(monthly_revenue) as avg_revenue from restaurants group by zip_code having count(*) >= 2 order by avg_orders desc

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_revenue, monthly_ad_spend, ROUND(monthly_revenue / monthly_ad_spend, 2) AS revenue_per_ad_dollar, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE uses_ads = 1 ORDER BY revenue_per_ad_dollar DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_revenue, monthly_ad_spend, round(monthly_revenue / monthly_ad_spend, 2) as revenue_per_ad_dollar, is_managed from restaurants where uses_ads = 1 order by revenue_per_ad_dollar desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC) AS rank, restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0 ORDER BY rank LIMIT 10
normalized: select rank() over (order by monthly_orders desc) as rank, restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed from restaurants where is_managed = 0 order by rank limit 10

pattern: SELECT RANK() OVER (ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC) AS rank, restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 1 ORDER BY rank LIMIT 10
normalized: select rank() over (order by monthly_orders desc) as rank, restaurant_id, restaurant_name, monthly_orders, is_managed from restaurants where is_managed = 1 order by rank limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, SUM(monthly_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS running_total_revenue, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0 ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, sum(monthly_revenue) over (order by monthly_orders desc rows unbounded preceding) as running_total_revenue, is_managed from restaurants where is_managed = 0 order by monthly_orders desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, SUM(monthly_revenue) OVER (ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC ROWS UNBOUNDED PRECEDING) AS running_total_revenue, is_managed FROM restaurants WHERE is_managed = 1 ORDER BY monthly_orders DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, monthly_orders, monthly_revenue, sum(monthly_revenue) over (order by monthly_orders desc rows unbounded preceding) as running_total_revenue, is_managed from restaurants where is_managed = 1 order by monthly_orders desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, monthly_orders, is_managed, PERCENT_RANK() OVER (ORDER BY monthly_orders) AS percentile FROM restaurants ORDER BY percentile DESC LIMIT 10
normalized: select restaurant_id, monthly_orders, is_managed, percent_rank() over (order by monthly_orders) as percentile from restaurants order by percentile desc limit 10

pattern: SELECT restaurant_id, conversion_rate, monthly_orders, page_views FROM restaurants WHERE conversion_rate > 1 ORDER BY conversion_rate DESC
normalized: select restaurant_id, conversion_rate, monthly_orders, page_views from restaurants where conversion_rate > 1 order by conversion_rate desc

pattern: SELECT MIN(monthly_orders) AS min_orders, MAX(monthly_orders) AS max_orders, AVG(monthly_orders) AS avg_orders, MEDIAN(monthly_orders) AS median_orders, MIN(monthly_revenue) AS min_revenue, MAX(monthly_revenue) AS max_revenue, AVG(monthly_revenue) AS avg_revenue FROM restaurants
normalized: select min(monthly_orders) as min_orders, max(monthly_orders) as max_orders, avg(monthly_orders) as avg_orders, median(monthly_orders) as median_orders, min(monthly_revenue) as min_revenue, max(monthly_revenue) as max_revenue, avg(monthly_revenue) as avg_revenue from restaurants

pattern: SELECT COUNT(*) AS mixed_scale_fields FROM data_dictionary WHERE field_name IN ('conversion_rate','cancellation_rate') AND scale_type IN ('0_to_1','0_to_100')
normalized: select count(*) as mixed_scale_fields from data_dictionary where field_name in ('conversion_rate','cancellation_rate') and scale_type in ('0_to_1','0_to_100')

pattern: SELECT column_name, COUNT(*) - COUNT(value) AS null_count, ROUND(100.0 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(value)) / COUNT(*), 1) AS null_pct FROM atl_restaurants_unpivot GROUP BY column_name HAVING null_count > 0 ORDER BY null_pct DESC LIMIT 5
normalized: select column_name, count(*) - count(value) as null_count, round(100.0 * (count(*) - count(value)) / count(*), 1) as null_pct from atl_restaurants_unpivot group by column_name having null_count > 0 order by null_pct desc limit 5

pattern: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) AS month, SUM(order_value) AS monthly_sales, SUM(SUM(order_value)) OVER (ORDER BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date)) AS cumulative_sales FROM delivery_data WHERE store_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT store_id FROM owner_mapping WHERE account_owner IN ('Kevin','Carla')) GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', order_date) ORDER BY month
normalized: select date_trunc('month', order_date) as month, sum(order_value) as monthly_sales, sum(sum(order_value)) over (order by date_trunc('month', order_date)) as cumulative_sales from delivery_data where store_id in (select distinct store_id from owner_mapping where account_owner in ('kevin','carla')) group by date_trunc('month', order_date) order by month

pattern: SELECT tier, intervention, estimated_order_lift_pct, estimated_cost_per_store_usd, ROUND(estimated_order_lift_pct / estimated_cost_per_store_usd, 4) AS lift_per_dollar FROM intervention_candidates ORDER BY tier, lift_per_dollar DESC
normalized: select tier, intervention, estimated_order_lift_pct, estimated_cost_per_store_usd, round(estimated_order_lift_pct / estimated_cost_per_store_usd, 4) as lift_per_dollar from intervention_candidates order by tier, lift_per_dollar desc

pattern: SELECT support_model, restaurants_supported, variable_cost_per_store_usd, monthly_orders_lift_per_store, aov_usd, take_rate, ROUND(monthly_orders_lift_per_store * aov_usd * take_rate, 2) AS monthly_incremental_rev_per_store, ROUND(monthly_orders_lift_per_store * aov_usd * take_rate * 12 * restaurants_supported, 2) AS annual_incremental_rev FROM pilot_cost_scenarios
normalized: select support_model, restaurants_supported, variable_cost_per_store_usd, monthly_orders_lift_per_store, aov_usd, take_rate, round(monthly_orders_lift_per_store * aov_usd * take_rate, 2) as monthly_incremental_rev_per_store, round(monthly_orders_lift_per_store * aov_usd * take_rate * 12 * restaurants_supported, 2) as annual_incremental_rev from pilot_cost_scenarios

pattern: SELECT 'unmanaged_avg_orders' AS metric, ROUND(AVG(monthly_orders)) AS value FROM atl_restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0 UNION ALL SELECT 'managed_avg_orders', ROUND(AVG(monthly_orders)) FROM atl_restaurants WHERE is_managed = 1 UNION ALL SELECT 'gap_ratio', ROUND(AVG(CASE WHEN is_managed = 1 THEN monthly_orders END)::numeric / AVG(CASE WHEN is_managed = 0 THEN monthly_orders END), 2) FROM atl_restaurants UNION ALL SELECT 'unmanaged_count', COUNT(*) FROM atl_restaurants WHERE is_managed = 0
normalized: select 'unmanaged_avg_orders' as metric, round(avg(monthly_orders)) as value from atl_restaurants where is_managed = 0 union all select 'managed_avg_orders', round(avg(monthly_orders)) from atl_restaurants where is_managed = 1 union all select 'gap_ratio', round(avg(case when is_managed = 1 then monthly_orders end)::numeric / avg(case when is_managed = 0 then monthly_orders end), 2) from atl_restaurants union all select 'unmanaged_count', count(*) from atl_restaurants where is_managed = 0
